form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 6th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track beaten 18 m by High Speed Swan (1:55.30) in NW15000L5 on March 27 at $31.06. Showed ability the race before when he posted a big 4 m win (Fr1) at this track (1:58.10) beating Sensi Amnesia in NW10000L5 on March 13 at $5.91. Not out of the equation.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr8) over 1609m at Meadowlands, beaten 19 m by Maximum Exposure (1:53.20) in NW10500L5 on March 27 at $21.
